title: urocarpidium limense
intro: Urocarpidium limense is a species of plant in the family Icacinaceae, commonly known as the 'Mexican plum.' Native to Mexico and Central America, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Urocarpidium limense include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve using its leaves and bark to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
